data.body: CHECKPOINT: Starting fix. Identified 2 calls in test-merge-state.sh (lines 236, 252) that call ms_is_merge_in_progress without cd-ing into temp repo. Lines 236 and 252 use _MERGE_STATE_GIT_DIR override but no cd subshell. The golden-path tests (S5-C1, S5-C6, S5-C7) already use (cd "$repo" && ...) correctly. Fixing test-merge-state.sh now.
